memoryArtifacts.description:

zh.Exeter, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Swett於1506年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Phillip John Sweet31歲，母親Mrs Phillip John Sweet32歲。他和Mary Periam至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1547年2月27日在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特享年41歲。

zh-hans.Exeter, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Swett于1506年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Phillip John Sweet31岁，母亲Mrs Phillip John Sweet32岁。他和Mary Periam至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1547年2月27日在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Sweet  . This surname is also found in Chile, where it is at least in part of North American origin.
Americanized (possibly shortened) form of an unidentified eastern Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Sweet
meanings: English (Somerset): from the Middle English personal name Swet(e) (Old English Swēt(a) (male), Swēte (female)), or else a nickname from Middle English swet(e), sweyt ‘sweet; pleasing; beloved; attractive’ (Old English swēte, swōt), from which the personal names derive. Compare Swett .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Suess   and French   Ledoux   ‘the gentle, the sweet’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Swett was born in 1506, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Phillip John Sweet, was 31 and his mother, Mrs Phillip John Sweet, was 32. He had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Mary Periam. He died on 27 February 1547, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Swett est né en 1506, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Phillip John Sweet, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs Phillip John Sweet, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Mary Periam. Il est décédé le 27 février 1547, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Swett 1506 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Phillip John Sweet 31 und seine Mutter Mrs Phillip John Sweet 32. Er hatte mit Mary Periam mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Februar 1547 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Swett è nato il nel 1506 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Phillip John Sweet, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Phillip John Sweet, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Mary Periam. Morì il 27 febbraio 1547, nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.Exeter, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボンエクセター
ja.Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Swettが1506年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Phillip John Sweetは31歳，母Mrs Phillip John Sweetは32歳であった。彼はMary Periamとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1547年2月27日にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Swett(이)가 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Phillip John Sweet(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Phillip John Sweet(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Mary Periam(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 2월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Exeter, Devon, England: Exeter, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Swett nasceu em 1506, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Phillip John Sweet, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Phillip John Sweet, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Mary Periam. Ele faleceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1547, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Swett родился в 1506 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Phillip John Sweet было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Phillip John Sweet, 32. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Mary Periam. Он умер 27 февраля 1547 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Swett nació en 1506, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Phillip John Sweet, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs Phillip John Sweet, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Mary Periam. Murió el 27 de febrero de 1547, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
